title: Create SkyBlock+
description: A minimalist Skyblock experience focused on the Create mod—build, automate, and expand your island using mechanical engineering and kinetic power.
body:
A unique take on the classic Skyblock experience, this modpack revolves entirely around the Create mod and its ecosystem of addons. Starting from almost nothing, you are challenged to build up your world using creativity, engineering, and clever automation instead of traditional progression paths.

Rather than relying on magic or overpowered tools, your journey is driven by mechanical power. Generate rotation, transfer energy through shafts and belts, and design increasingly complex contraptions to process resources. What begins as simple hand-cranked machines quickly evolves into fully automated production lines, where efficiency and design become key to your success.

Every resource must be earned through thoughtful setups and smart engineering. Expand your floating island, optimize your systems, and experiment with different Create addons that introduce new mechanics, machines, and possibilities. Whether it's precision crafting, bulk processing, or large-scale automation, the modpack encourages you to think like an engineer.

With a strong focus on progression, creativity, and satisfying automation, this Skyblock experience offers a rewarding challenge for players who enjoy building, optimizing, and watching their machines come to life high above the void.
